nodes.name: Supabase — Insert error_log

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ workflow_id: $json.workflow.id, workflow_run_id: $json.execution.id, kind: ($json.execution.lastNodeExecuted || "").toLowerCase().includes("anthropic") ? "anthropic_error" : ($json.execution.lastNodeExecuted || "").toLowerCase().includes("supabase") ? "supabase_error" : ($json.execution.lastNodeExecuted || "").toLowerCase().includes("validate") ? "validation_error" : "execution_error", error_message: (($json.execution.error || {}).message || "unknown error"), attempt_count: 2, context: JSON.stringify({ execution_url: $json.execution.url, last_node: $json.execution.lastNodeExecuted, workflow_name: $json.workflow.name }) }) }}

nodes.notes: kind is derived from the failing node name: contains 'anthropic'→anthropic_error, 'supabase'→supabase_error, 'validate'→validation_error, else execution_error.

nodes.name: Slack — Error Alert

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ blocks: [{ type: "header", text: { type: "plain_text", text: "🚨 AutoStream Error" } }, { type: "section", fields: [{ type: "mrkdwn", text: "*Workflow:* " + ($('Error Trigger').first().json.workflow.name || $('Error Trigger').first().json.workflow.id) }, { type: "mrkdwn", text: "*Execution ID:* " + $('Error Trigger').first().json.execution.id }, { type: "mrkdwn", text: "*Error:* " + (($('Error Trigger').first().json.execution.error || {}).message || "unknown") }, { type: "mrkdwn", text: "*Last node:* " + ($('Error Trigger').first().json.execution.lastNodeExecuted || "unknown") }] }, { type: "actions", elements: [{ type: "button", text: { type: "plain_text", text: "View Execution" }, url: $('Error Trigger').first().json.execution.url || "" }] }] }) }}

nodes.notes: References $('Error Trigger') directly because $json is empty after Supabase insert (Prefer: return=minimal). Posts Block Kit to #autostream-errors.
